aiCommentCN: 涨的时候怕错过，跌的时候怕买错。
aiCommentEN: Fear missing out when up, fear buying wrong when down.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短线有望继续上涨。
【关键位置】
73,000 美元支撑位、75,000 美元阻力位。
【短线策略】
低位买入，高位卖出。
【风险提醒】
市场波动风险，需谨慎交易。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin is likely to continue its upward trend.
[Key Drivers]
$73,000 support and $75,000 resistance.
[Outlook]
Buy low, sell high.
[Reminder]
Market volatility risk, trade with caution.
